title: phyteuma orbiculare subsp. ellipticum
intro: Phyteuma orbiculare subsp. ellipticum, also known as the elliptical bellflower, is a subspecies of the Phyteuma orbiculare plant, a type of flowering plant in the Campanulaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phyteuma orbiculare subsp. ellipticum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment, making it a popular choice in herbalism for addressing various health issues.
